title: agathosma betulina
intro: Agathosma betulina, also known as buchu, is a shrubby plant native to the Western Cape province of South Africa, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains limonene and pinene, compounds that have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of buchu include its potential to alleviate urinary tract infections, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oil blends, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy immune system.
